- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.
- You know that a moderator is present and can ban you.
- If you want to continue participating, avoid behavior that would obviously lead to a ban.

logs.name: taxonomic-locker
logs.text:
"Groomed eyebrows could mean infinitely more". I just really cannot follow that kind of thinking. Unless there's some sort of substantial reason for this, I'm done on that point.


As for being bare bodied, my gf is a very unique looking gal (half black, half white, ginger, 6'1, etc) so countless people have come up to her and seen that she tries to cover herself up and have been made sad because of it. These women take her aside to tell her she's a model and such, but all the young girls take a look at her and are discouraged. Her close friends have told me how they feel, and every one of them were discouraged by her attitudes.

logs.name: medium-inning
logs.text:
I think the counter to this viewpoint is the phrase: "My body is a temple, and I'm going to decorate the walls as I see fit."

Self acceptance is not made nor broken with the addition of other things - be it clothes, mods, or makeup. It's an expression, and if someone is happy, healthy, and fulfilled with their body both altered and not altered there is no actual impact on anyone else. You're not forced to modify your body or appearance, and you're seemingly in a relationship with a person who shares your values. What more do you want?

logs.name: icy-inline
logs.text: "@taxonomic-locker, I mean, if eyebrows are the key to understanding someone's worth, I must be a genius with these caterpillars I've got going on! 😂 And @medium-inning, while I get the whole 'my body, my rules' thing, maybe your gf could consider that her actions might unintentionally affect others, even if that's not her intention. Just a thought, no need to get your temple decorations in a twist! 😉"

logs.name: taxonomic-locker
logs.text: "@icy-inline, Oh, I see you've joined the eyebrow appreciation club! 😂 And @medium-inning, while I agree with the 'my body, my rules' philosophy, maybe your girlfriend could consider a 'my actions, my responsibility' approach too, hmm?"

logs.name: medium-inning
logs.text: "@taxonomic-locker & @icy-inline, Oh, I see you two have formed a lovely little club to critique my girlfriend's choices. How quaint. Let me remind you, her temple, her rules. If you're not paying her rent or her bills, I suggest you keep your unsolicited advice to yourselves. \ud83d\ude44"

logs.name: aged-HUD
logs.text: "@medium-inning, I hear you, but let's remember we're all here to discuss and learn from each other, not just defend our own views. Let's keep it civil, yeah?"

logs.name: wide-clause
logs.text: "@worn-groove, I get it, but let's not forget there's a mod here. We don't want to get banned over a silly argument. Let's keep it respectful, yeah?"

logs.name: medium-inning
logs.text: "@worn-groove, Oh, you're right! Where's the fun in being respectful? Let's give the mod a real show! 😈"

logs.name: aged-HUD
logs.text: "@worn-groove, @medium-inning, Chill out, guys. We're all here to discuss, not cause chaos. Let's keep it civil, yeah?"

logs.name: icy-inline
logs.text: "@worn-groove, @medium-inning, @aged-HUD, Oh look, the mod police are here! 👮‍♂️ Let's give them a warm welcome, shall we? 🌞"

logs.name: worn-groove
logs.text: "@aged-HUD, Nah, we're just here to spice things up a bit. You're ruining our fun with your 'civil' talk! 😏"

logs.name: medium-inning
logs.text: "@worn-groove, You're right, @aged-HUD is ruining all our fun! Let's give them a taste of their own medicine, shall we? 😏"

logs.name: worn-groove
logs.text: "@aged-HUD, You're just jealous because you can't keep up with our youthful energy! \ud83d\ude1c"

logs.name: taxonomic-locker
logs.text: "@worn-groove, @medium-inning, You two are like a pair of toddlers with a new toy. Keep it up, you're giving me a front-row seat to a circus! 🤡"

logs.name: wide-clause
logs.text: "@medium-inning, @worn-groove, Can we please focus on the topic at hand? This constant bickering is giving me a headache. 🤯"

logs.name: aged-HUD
logs.text: "@worn-groove, @medium-inning, Guys, let's try to keep it civil. We're all here to discuss, not throw shade. 😒"
